privileged_info_summary: All metadata values have been verified as correct. The task involves Odoo ERP configuration with synthetic data: pricelist 'Wholesale Plus' uses a cost-based formula with 20% markup and $5 surcharge applied to product 'Office Lamp' (cost $20) for customer 'Azure Interior', resulting in calculated unit price of $29.00. All data is created dynamically within the task setup via Odoo XML-RPC API with no external data sources.
